top_signals.title: Bitcoin slides toward $63,000 as Coinbase premium stays negative for a record 60 days
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin fell near $63,000 as chip stocks sold off, the Coinbase premium stayed negative a record 60 days, and ETF flows remain thin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bank of England appoints Rhys Phillips as the new Chief Cashier
top_signals.summary: The Governor of the Bank of England, Andrew Bailey, has announced that Rhys Phillips will be the next Chief Cashier and Director of Notes. He will take up the role on 19 October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin returns to $63,000 as Nasdaq trims large early loss
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
